title: Security Advisory Check
description: Research whether a product, driver, error, or version is tied to a security advisory.
starter_prompt: Check whether this product, driver, error, or version has a relevant security advisory.

phases.prompt: Clarify product name, version, platform, and advisory scope.
Find official vendor, Microsoft, NVD/CVE, CISA, release note, or security bulletin sources.
phases.completion: Primary sources are found or absence is stated.

phases.prompt: Check citation quality, affected version match, severity, mitigation, and whether claims exceed source evidence.

Write a technician-readable advisory brief with target scope, evidence, actions/tools used, citations/artifacts, affected versions, severity, mitigation, verification status, cleanup status, confidence, residual risk, and follow-up.
Preserve citations, report, and research notes; remove only temporary scratch files created by this workflow.

acceptance_criteria: Unconfirmed forum claims are separated from official guidance.
